allow: Bash(python -c "import fastapi, sqlalchemy, alembic, pydantic_settings; print\('core deps OK'\)")
Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import fastapi, sqlalchemy, alembic, anthropic, pytest, httpx; print\('all deps OK'\)")

Bash(DATABASE_URL="sqlite:///./dep_pm.db" ./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('dep_pm.db'\); print\('tables:', sorted\(r[0] for r in c.execute\(\\"select name from sqlite_master where type='table'\\"\)\)\); print\('agents:', c.execute\('select name,role,mode from agents'\).fetchall\(\)\)")
